issues.description: FlipLife action missing condition. Effect states 'Add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards' unconditionally, but GiveKeyword [Rush] is conditional on 'if you have 2 or less Life cards'. FlipLife should not have a condition, but GiveKeyword requires a condition: HasLessOrEqualLifeCards with value 2.
GiveKeyword action missing condition. The [Rush] keyword is only granted 'if you have 2 or less Life cards' — this requires a condition that is currently absent.
